Uses of Package
me.kevinboone.caztor.swing

Packages that use me.kevinboone.caztor.swing
Package
Description
me.kevinboone.caztor.swing
The Swing user interface for Caztor.
  • Classes in me.kevinboone.caztor.swing used by me.kevinboone.caztor.swing
    Class
    Description
    CaztorDialog
    A base class for all the dialogs Caztor uses.
    DefaultDownloadMonitor
    This is the default implementation of DownloadMonitor for the Swing UI.
    DefaultFeedHandler
    The main feed handler.
    DownloadsDialog
    DownloadsDialog shows the contents of the DownloadsMonitor as a JFrame.
    FeedManagerDialog
    FeedManagerDialog provides the interface to the FeedManager, and shows the progress of feed aggregation.
    MainWindow
    MainWindow is where most of the work of the Swing UI happens.
    SettingsPane
    The base class for all the individual tabs of the Settings dialog.
    SwingDownload
    This class represents a single instance of an ongoing or complete download.
